title: cyperus eragrostis var. microstachyus
intro: Cyperus eragrostis var. microstachyus, commonly known as the purple papyrus or purple cyperus, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus eragrostis var. microstachyus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
